name: codex-lark-plugin
description: Codex channel plugin for Feishu/Lark — chat with Codex through Feishu with local-file memory and scheduled jobs
author: IS908 <kevinchen0635@gmail.com> (https://github.com/IS908)

scripts.build: tsc && node scripts/build-runtime-bundles.js --target . && npm --prefix plugins/lark run --silent build
scripts.smoke:sdk: node --import tsx scripts/sdk-channel-scaffold-smoke.ts && node --import tsx scripts/sdk-identity-smoke.ts && node --import tsx scripts/sdk-message-parity-smoke.ts && node --import tsx scripts/sdk-outbound-parity-smoke.ts && node --import tsx scripts/lark-transport-smoke.ts && node --import tsx scripts/sdk-runtime-smoke.ts && node --import tsx scripts/sdk-rollout-doc-smoke.ts
